permalink: /llms-full.txt
layout: null
sitemap: false
---
# {{ site.title }} — Full Content

> {{ site.description }}

Full prose dump for AI consumers. Generated from Jekyll source. Content blocks are HTML-fragmented (no site chrome). For machine-readable example metadata see `/api/examples.json`. Curated index at `/llms.txt`.

Source: {{ site.url }}
Generated: {{ site.time | date_to_xmlschema }}

================================================================================
SECTION 1 — VIBE CODING EXAMPLES ({{ site.examples.size }} entries)
================================================================================

{%- assign sorted_examples = site.examples | sort: 'order' %}
{% for ex in sorted_examples %}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### {{ ex.title }}

URL: {{ ex.url | absolute_url }}
Slug: {{ ex.slug }}
Order: {{ ex.order }}
Category: {{ ex.category }}
Difficulty: {{ ex.difficulty }}
Status: {{ ex.status }}
Tags: {{ ex.tags | join: ', ' }}
{% if ex.stack %}Stack: {{ ex.stack | join: ', ' }}{% endif %}

Tagline: {{ ex.tagline }}

Prompt:
{{ ex.prompt }}

Lessons:
{% for lesson in ex.lessons %}- {{ lesson }}
{% endfor %}

Body:
{{ ex.content }}

{% endfor %}

================================================================================
SECTION 2 — POSTS ({{ site.posts.size }} entries — full content)
================================================================================

{% for post in site.posts %}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### {{ post.title }}

URL: {{ post.url | absolute_url }}
Date: {{ post.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}
{% if post.tags %}Tags: {{ post.tags | join: ', ' }}{% endif %}

{{ post.content }}

{% endfor %}

================================================================================
SECTION 3 — DIGITAL TWIN FIELD NOTES ({{ site.twin_posts.size }} entries)
================================================================================

{% for tp in site.twin_posts %}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### {{ tp.title }}

URL: {{ tp.url | absolute_url }}
{% if tp.date %}Date: {{ tp.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}{% endif %}

{{ tp.content }}

{% endfor %}

================================================================================
END OF FULL CONTENT DUMP
